sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15356" key="a)rotrai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀροτρ-αῖος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰρ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n15356.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of corn-land, rustic,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θαλάμη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.209</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
